title: Bigen 16x
description: a pvp/bedwars default edit texture pack that looks great (i think so)
body:
![Bigen16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b04f33e5ef3322af400430483c6a9554684059.png)

![Version tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0b17a98aac49c70293fe7119946d82ad591d4d.png)

![Check the version tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/384ffc2a66fcf2e1f499973f5aa1c3cf033f4d3d.png)

![Bigen packs.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8be27a95a22933d10312fc6e1afbd9724e6940b.png)

- Weighs less than 7 Mb
- Some moving textures
- Sky-optimized texture
- Bordered wool
- Clean and Translucent UI
- Fire effect overlay reduced
- Underwater clean screen

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfc5cd0852dddbe3736e57bb07f40d65159a0c0.png)

![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d029ea76252b82e1d609cb1e064b4422895cf7df.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_Z7-pD27Vv8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> _I created it a long time ago, and unfortunately I didn't note credits for some original textures. If you want to claim credits, please feel free to contact me._
